case_title: MARTHE RIVERA VS. NICHOLAS MICHAEL TORRES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RIVERA, MARTHE AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES, NICHOLAS MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-04-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIVERA, MARTHE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TORRES, NICHOLAS MICHAEL $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $292.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,292.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE AFFIDAVIT OF UNSUCCESSFUL SERVICE ATTACHED FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIVERA, MARTHE AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES, NICHOLAS MICHAEL

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL, AFFIDAVIT OF REASONABLE DILIGENCE ATTACHED. FEE FOR SERVICE $137.50 SERVED JUL-06-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES, NICHOLAS MICHAEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-04-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-04-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MARTHE RIVERA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NICHOLAS MICHEAL TORRES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-04-2017 - JUDGMENT.
